actionConfiguration.body:
INSERT INTO upper_part_process (session_id, part_id, cos_before_package_id, cos_type)
VALUES (
  {{this.params.sessionId}},
  '{{this.params.partId}}',
  {{this.params.packageId}},
  (SELECT cbp.cos_type::cos_type_enum FROM cos_before_package cbp WHERE cbp.id = {{this.params.packageId}})
)
ON CONFLICT (session_id, part_id)
DO UPDATE SET
  cos_before_package_id = {{this.params.packageId}},
  cos_type = COALESCE(
    (SELECT cbp.cos_type::cos_type_enum FROM cos_before_package cbp WHERE cbp.id = {{this.params.packageId}}),
    upper_part_process.cos_type
  ),
  copied_from_session_id = NULL,
  updated_at = NOW();
